name: commit-doc-sync
description: After a successful git commit, launches a sub-agent to review the diff and amend CLAUDE.md / README.md if needed. Gated by a file-type heuristic — skips pure doc/test/config/generated-file commits. Set COMMIT_DOC_AGENT_CMD to override the agent command (default: claude -p). Set COMMIT_DOC_SYNC_DISABLE=1 to disable.
